news.title: 2026 Industry Trends & Company Updates
news.summary: Explore the latest developments in fastener technology and WT Fasteners' strategic expansion plans for 2026.

items.title: Hex Bolts
items.summary: Full and partial thread hex bolts in DIN 931/933, ISO 4014/4017. Grades 4.8 to 12.9, sizes M4–M64.

items.title: Flange Bolts
items.summary: Serrated and non-serrated flange bolts per DIN 6921 / ISO 1665. Built-in washer face for vibration resistance.

items.title: Anchor Bolts
items.summary: Expansion anchors, wedge anchors, and chemical anchor bolts for concrete and masonry.

items.title: Standard Flat Washers
items.summary: DIN 125 / ISO 7089 flat washers in all common sizes. Zinc plated, galvanized, or plain finish.

items.title: Custom Washers
items.summary: OEM and ODM washers made to your drawings. Special dimensions, materials, coatings, and packaging.
